note: perf v0.3 — compile_s included; B=1, image_size=224, n_vis=64, seq_len=72.
interpretation: Compiled is ~50% faster than eager DESPITE 16 graph breaks. The breaks fragment the trace, but Inductor still optimizes the un-broken segments (vision encoder MLPs, attention compute). Unlike Dbrx where breaks fully neutralized compile, here the speedup floor is already > 1.0 — discovery strategies should improve fix-quality measures (fewer breaks, better fullgraph) but speedup vs baseline may not be the right ranking signal here. Compare against compiled_ms=6.65 ms and graph_break_count=16.
